option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
#!/bin/bash # Fix IntelliJ Launch Configuration Script
set -e
echo "=== Fixing IntelliJ IDEA Launch Configuration ==="
# Stop Gradle daemon echo "1. Stopping Gradle daemon..." ./gradlew --stop || true
# Remove launch cache echo "2. Removing launch cache..." rm -f .gradle/loom-cache/launch.cfg
# Regenerate launch configuration echo "3. Regenerating launch configuration..." ./gradlew generateDLIConfig configureClientLaunch
echo "" echo "=== Configuration regenerated successfully! ===" echo "" echo "Next steps:" echo "1. In IntelliJ IDEA, go to: File > Invalidate Caches..." echo "2. Check 'Clear file system cache and Local History'" echo "3. Click 'Invalidate and Restart'" echo "" echo "OR" echo "" echo "1. Close IntelliJ IDEA completely" echo "2. Delete: .idea/workspace.xml" echo "3. Reopen IntelliJ IDEA" echo "" echo "The launch.cfg file is at:" echo " $(pwd)/.gradle/loom-cache/launch.cfg" echo ""

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
#!/bin/bash # Verify IntelliJ Launch Configuration
echo "=== Verifying IntelliJ IDEA Launch Configuration ===" echo ""
PROJECT_DIR="/home/ember/Documents/Code/Java/XaeroShare" LAUNCH_CFG="$PROJECT_DIR/.gradle/loom-cache/launch.cfg" CLIENT_XML="$PROJECT_DIR/.idea/runConfigurations/Minecraft_Client.xml"
# Check launch.cfg exists if [ -f "$LAUNCH_CFG" ]; then echo "✅ launch.cfg exists at: $LAUNCH_CFG" echo " Size: $(du -h "$LAUNCH_CFG" | cut -f1)" else echo "❌ launch.cfg NOT FOUND at: $LAUNCH_CFG" echo " Run: ./gradlew generateDLIConfig" exit 1 fi
echo ""
# Check run configuration exists if [ -f "$CLIENT_XML" ]; then echo "✅ Minecraft_Client.xml exists" else echo "❌ Minecraft_Client.xml NOT FOUND" exit 1 fi
echo ""
# Check for bad paths in XML if grep -q "/home/piny" "$CLIENT_XML"; then echo "❌ Found hardcoded /home/piny paths in Minecraft_Client.xml" echo " These need to be fixed!" grep "/home/piny" "$CLIENT_XML" exit 1 else echo "✅ No hardcoded /home/piny paths found" fi
echo ""
# Check for PROJECT_DIR usage if grep -q '\$PROJECT_DIR\$' "$CLIENT_XML"; then echo "✅ Using \$PROJECT_DIR\$ variable correctly" else echo "⚠️ Warning: \$PROJECT_DIR\$ variable not found" fi
echo ""
# Check for module specification if grep -q '<module name="XaeroShare.client"/>' "$CLIENT_XML"; then echo "✅ Module XaeroShare.client is specified" else echo "⚠️ Warning: Module specification missing or incorrect" fi
echo ""
# Show the VM parameters line echo "Current VM Parameters in XML:" grep -o 'VM_PARAMETERS.*' "$CLIENT_XML" | sed 's/"/\n /g' | head -5
echo "" echo "=== Configuration appears correct! ===" echo "" echo "If IntelliJ still shows errors, you need to:" echo " 1. File > Invalidate Caches... > Invalidate and Restart" echo " 2. OR delete .idea/workspace.xml and reopen IntelliJ" echo ""
